mapper.insert: /* JuicefailOnlineChkMapper.setMsgQueue */ INSERT INTO MSG_QUEUE ( MSEQ, /* Sequence */ MSG_TYPE, /* 1:SMS 2:SMS URL 3:MMS 4:MMS URL */ DSTADDR, /* 수신자 번호 */ CALLBACK, /* 발신자 번호 */ STAT, /* 0=전송대기(초기값), 1=송신중 2=송신완료, 3=결과수신 */ TEXT, /* 전송메시지 */ EXPIRETIME, /* 유효시간 */ REQUEST_TIME, /* 발송요청시간 */ OPT_ID /* 임의사용--Ktis정책, 호출프로세서ID(Java모듈명, Oracle 프로시져명) */ ) VALUES ( SMS_SEQ.NEXTVAL , '3' , #{phone, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , '18995000' , '0' , #{msg, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , 7200 , SYSDATE , 'BTCH_failOnlineChk' )
mapper.select: SELECT B.CD_VAL AS PHONE FROM CMN_GRP_MST A , CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE A.GRP_ID = B.GRP_ID AND A.USG_YN = 'Y' AND B.USG_YN = 'Y' AND A.GRP_ID = 'CMN0229' AND B.ETC1 = 'PHONE'
